analysis_note: Gaps identified by comparing competitor blog content against Argo's published (1 post) and queued (3 posts) content.

gaps.notes: Multiple competitors publish heavily on automating client workflows, lead capture, and booking. Argo has nothing on this yet. Studio Ninja and Dubsado have multiple posts on workflow automation.

gaps.topic: How to start a photography business (beginner guide)
gaps.notes: Massive top-of-funnel keyword. Pixifi has 'How to Start a Photography Business', Dubsado targets first-time business owners. Argo should create a comprehensive photographer-specific version.
Pixifi has multiple contract-related posts. ShootProof has e-sign contracts as a feature. Argo has no content on contracts, templates, or legal essentials for photographers.

gaps.topic: Client onboarding for photographers / client experience
gaps.notes: Dubsado's 'seamless client onboarding' post, Studio Ninja's 'client experience revolution' and 'client journey audit' — this is a key decision-stage topic Argo is missing.
Studio Ninja dominates wedding business content (managing multiple weddings, wedding CRM, 2026 couples expectations). Argo has zero wedding-specific content.

gaps.topic: Photography mini sessions / holiday sessions guide
gaps.notes: Pixifi has multiple mini session and holiday session posts. Seasonal but high intent. Plan for Q3/Q4 publication.

gaps.topic: Burnout prevention / work-life balance for photographers
gaps.notes: HoneyBook 'build business without burnout', Dubsado 'make space without burning out', Studio Ninja 'manage multiple weddings without burning out'. Emotional topic that builds brand affinity.
Pixifi has 'Building a Photography Portfolio'. Dubsado has 'Find First 5 Clients Without a Portfolio'. Top-of-funnel content for beginners.
URGENT OPPORTUNITY: Tave URLs are returning 410 errors. Confused Tave users are searching for alternatives NOW. Create a 'Switching from Tave to Argo' migration guide immediately.

gaps.topic: Small business finances / bookkeeping for photographers
gaps.notes: HoneyBook's 'managing finances' post, Pixifi's 'simplify finances during busy season', Dubsado's bookkeeping integration. Financial content builds trust and targets a real pain point.

gaps.topic: Photography business case studies / success stories
gaps.notes: HoneyBook publishes case studies aggressively (6-figure elopement photographer, beauty studio 3x revenue). Argo has zero customer stories. Even 2-3 would build credibility.

gaps.topic: AI tools for photographers / AI in photography business
gaps.notes: HoneyBook is leading heavily on AI positioning. Argo should either counter-position (human-first) or create content about AI tools photographers can actually use.

gaps.topic: Photography marketing / TikTok / social media for photographers
gaps.notes: HoneyBook has TikTok guide and social media content. Pixifi has 'Creative Campaigns to Market Your Photography Business'. High-volume topic Argo hasn't touched.

gaps.topic: Discovery calls / lead conversion for photographers
gaps.notes: Dubsado's discovery call questions post, Studio Ninja's enquiry conversion rate content. Niche but high-intent.
